title: Buffer Overflow
html:
Stub. The class of memory-corruption bug Yahir studied in spring-2025 CS security — D2L quiz on defenses (ASLR / stack protection / safe libraries / executable address-space protection / safe coding) on May 14, paired with same-day deep reading of the libwebp Huffman heap overflow as a real-world exemplar. Sibling concepts: reverse engineering, two factor authentication bypass.
